reviews.review_description: Signed up, reset password and started getting an error saying all my codes are used up.  Emailed support and technical teams, no response, has been 3 days so far - not even an automated response acknowledging my case.

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry to hear that. We'll look into what happened with your email. In the meantime, can you email 'dom@virtualspeech.com' and I'll fix your account straight away.

reviews.review_description: The gfx are good , but think the subscription is far to expensive for what it is if it was about  $15 or 20$ that’s a more sensible price , then I might consider it
I didn’t have my VR headset code before as I had purchased with a different email. 😑 I feel awful because they did in fact reach out and resolved my issue.

reviews.review_title: Upload own presentation is paid feature
reviews.review_description: Fun way to practice your presentation. But you can't use your own. Because you can't login with a paid subscription. App and website suggest you can though.

developer_response.body: Sorry about the confusion, we'll aim to make this clearer on the website.

reviews.review_description: Really useful for practicing public speaking and improving confidence and anxiety!

The combination of VR and AI makes this app a very unique learning experience that gives you that exact same feeling of being put on the spot and facing difficult conversations. I personally love how it creates a safe space for you try as many times as you need while you practice daunting scenarios such as presenting in front of large groups of people.
Helpfull

developer_response.body: Hello, can you please check that the mic permission is enabled for the app?

reviews.review_description: I have been using VirtualSpeech for a little while now, and have found it extremely helpful in building my confidence for presentations and job interviews. A recent update has made the response times much quicker too!
I like the content and want to continue using the app. However, I purchased a monthly subscription and it does not show up on my account. The invoice was captured on my end. Please help.

developer_response.body: Hello, please contact info@virtualspeech.com and we'll sort this issue out for you, or use the contact form on our webpage.

reviews.review_description:
VirtualSpeech is an excellent app!!
Being able to simulate real-word conversations and scenarios is a game changer! I've been using it for a little while now and I have learnt so much and feel so much more confident. Love it!

reviews.review_title: Excellent app if you are not scammed
reviews.review_description:
Once I used the all access app, it is excellent. However, now I bought an all acces subscription for a month, BUT my account remained the same (I didn't improve to all acces), I just received a message saying that I will receive a VR code, but I didn't received. I am in hurry to use the interview scenario, so I paid again thinking there was an error, but same thing. I paid twice and I still can't enter the platform.

Please HELP!

developer_response.body: Hello, please email info@virtualspeech.com and we'll get you up and running ASAP and refund the duplicate payment. You can also see your VR code here when you log in: https://learn.virtualspeech.com/account/account-settings#vr-codes

reviews.review_title: ovation is 100% better more realistic Ai
reviews.review_description:
Having a conversation feels ridiculously weird we need to figure out how ovation made it work also too expensive for what you get
￼

developer_response.body: We've now added much faster response times. Let us know what you think!

reviews.review_description:
The system is difficult to understand and use, and the price is too high for beginners. There is room for improvement in every aspect.
(2025/01/28) Thank you for your reply. The problem I have is that the price is high. So I think they should offer a plan with lower price and limited features.

developer_response.body: Thanks - we have the demo version where you can use several of the roleplays and practice rooms. We'll look into if we can also offer a lower-priced tier in the future.

reviews.review_description:
update: what changes have you made in this latest update? Thaks 



------


It wouldn't be a bad app, in fact it's quite well optimised, except that every time I select Italian it is forgotten as soon as I change the screen, and if it selects a new Avatar I have to select the Italian language every time.

It's fine to be seated, but you should also have the possibility to get up and walk and get closer to your interlocutors, as far as the bar is concerned, or in any case there should be more dynamic situations in which the interlocutors can stand or make some movements, take a few steps, etc

And in any case you should at least give the possibility of making the user sit closer to the avatar with whom they are conversing: given that the Avatars are well made, it is a waste to keep them at a distance and not be able to see them up close, much less be able to move to get closer.

Of course you could use roomscale but if you have a small area you can't get close, and that's why either you give the user the opportunity to get up and move with the joystick or you bring him closer to the avatar with whom he communicates, but it would be better being able to get up and move with the joystick!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! In our latest update, when you set Italian, it will remember your choice so you don't need to select it each time.

We will also look into the possibility of moving around the room and sitting closer to the avatar, that's an interesting idea.

reviews.review_description: The VirtualSpeech  is a fantastic tool for improving public speaking and communication skills. Its immersive VR environment feels realistic, making practice sessions engaging and effective. The wide range of scenarios, like boardrooms and conference halls, helps build confidence for real-life situations. Interactive feedback and AI-driven tips are super helpful for tracking progress. Highly recommended for anyone looking to polish their speaking abilities in a fun, interactive way!

VirtualSpeech has been an absolute game-changer for us. The software is seriously impressive, packed with features that make training feel more real and engaging than anything we’ve tried before. Whether it's public speaking practice, negotiation skills, or even tough workplace conversations, the platform has everything covered.

One of the things we love most is how flexible it is. You can tweak the scenarios to match real-life situations we face in the business, and the environments feel so realistic. Even team members who aren’t tech-savvy found it easy to jump in and start using it.

The impact on our team has been huge. Confidence levels are up, communication skills are sharper, and you can actually see the difference in how people perform day to day. The instant feedback is a real highlight—it’s like having a personal coach guiding you through.

The VirtualSpeech team has been brilliant too; with a special mention to Myles. They’re always quick to help with any questions and genuinely care about making sure we get the most out of it - even if it means jumping on a video call in order to walk us through things.

If you’re looking for something that takes employee development to the next level, VirtualSpeech is a no-brainer. It’s simple, effective, and genuinely transforms how you approach training. 

We couldn’t recommend it enough!

reviews.review_title: A great tool for practice and feedback!
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: 2 years later and it's crazy how far the app has come! So many new features, the conversational AI that was implemented is so immersive. Its a fantastic experience for practicing my professional skills.

--

This has really helped with practicing some difficult scenarios for me as I've changed jobs, like networking and interviews. There are interesting sandbox levels for you to practice in or structured exercises and feedback to help with things like eye contact and filler words.

There is a mix of 3D Avatars and filmed 2D models depending on the scenario. I know the filmed audience members aren't to everyone's taste in VR, but I think they can be more realistic in some scenarios like speaking to an audience in a conference hall. Better sometimes for those to be real human faces rather than CG avatars. And if you're not leaving the stage does it matter what they look like from behind? Up close scenarios like the one to one podcast interview work well with 3D Avatars.

Its good to have the variety here either way. This isn't a AAA game, it works with the hardware and does exactly what it needs to do to develop hard to practice skills.

For me the biggest thing is the feedback, having actual tangible scores for soft skills that I can work on after each session helps me to feel like I'm making actual progress in my skills, as well as gaining confidence. 

Excited to see more courses coming out!

reviews.review_title: We need Virtual Speech with spanish
reviews.review_description:
The spanish community need this app with spanish language.

Thanks

reviews.review_title: A great App, but only inEnglish
reviews.review_description: It is a pity that the app is not available in one of the most widely spoken languages in the world.

reviews.review_title: Role play with ChatGPT is great.
reviews.review_description: I love the roleplay with ChatGPT funtion. It helps with English speaking skills a lot. I like how there are now five different characters to choose from and they have basic facial expressions now. And the Cafe setting is quite immersive. Only problem is the APP is sometimes buggy and unresponsive.
Buggy.  Should focus more energy on helping people overcome fear of public speaking.  Need much more “exposure therapy” type engagement.  This will unlock demand for all the other features.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback - our latest update (3.59) fixed many of the bugs you might have experienced. We'll look into adding more “exposure therapy” type scenarios too.

reviews.review_title: Has potential but somewhat buggy. And..
reviews.review_description: So this is very informative overall it has potential. I could see me using this to simulate interviews and practicing my presentation skills but I did see some room for improvement. The AI interrupted me several times in the auto mode and in manual mode it seemed to get confused if it was listening or answering my question. It seemed to only work after starting up after a few plays it started to mess up. I kept having to restart the app and it shuffled me through a few different looking AI but I noticed it's lacking women of color it could be that I only spent maybe 30 minutes in the app but still intriguing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! We've now fixed the Auto mode bug with the AI, let us know if you try the app again and how you get on with it.

reviews.review_title: It helps with my social skills
reviews.review_description: I have really bad social skills and this helps.

reviews.review_title: Did a free trial and cancelled
reviews.review_description: And still getting billed 45 dollars a month. No one will help me.

developer_response.body: Hi Jablina, please message me at dom@virtualspeech.com and I'll get this fixed for you asap.

reviews.review_title: A safe digital space to grow in speaking
reviews.review_description: VirtualSpeech is a comprehensive platform for building confidence and competence in the arena of public speaking. There are a number of courses that you can purchase through the website as well as a subscription model. However, I’d even recommend downloading the app just to check out some of the VR scenarios where you get used to being in front of virtual audiences. This app is potentially a game changer for those who want to build their skills in a safe, digital environment, before testing things out in the real world.

reviews.review_title: Too many problems at the moment
reviews.review_description:
The tone definitely needs to be adjusted. People might write (formally) like Chat GPT, but nobody speaks like that. You need to pre-prompt it with “conversational” or “casual” or “informal”. Maybe “Spartan”.

Having to press a button every time you speak is not very immersive.

Also the window for saying something is incredibly small, most of the time you get cut off.

The voice interpretation system needs to recognise when you have stoped speaking, and maybe learn to interrupt (like in real life) if it gets too long.

I’ll be back if these areas improve significantly.

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for the feedback! We've now developed a free-flowing conversation option for the roleplay room, so you don't need to keep pressing a button each time you speak. We'll keep working on the prompts to make them more conversational. Hope you enjoy the updates!

reviews.review_description: This app is NOT in 3D its just a 2D video of somebody loocking at a kamera. I REALLY DONT RECOMMEND IT! But if ja want shure do it, im just gonna say that my eyes hurt after a few minutes in there.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We've been working hard over the last couple of months to add 3D environments to the free version of the app, as well as sample presentation slides and AI-generated questions for practice. We hope you enjoy the new features!

reviews.review_description:
This application looks amazing however you are looking at about US$1000 to access the content..

What is presented in the free version of the app is to 2D. Why would you do that?  There is no indication that if I pay them the money that it would be in 3-D, which is a major mistake.

I love the concept, but I cannot afford $1000


￼

developer_response.body:
[Updated] You can now access all our VR and AI content for $45/month, or individual payments from $100.

We've also added many new 3D rooms and interactions to the app.

reviews.review_description:
All the people in the "audience" are flat like cardboard. 
Mate. This is VR... They don't feel real. Which is both the point of a) VR, and b) an app meant to feel realistic for training purposes.

Make the people actual 3D people, to create immersion, and I will check it out again.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We've been working hard over the last couple of months to add 3D avatars and environments to the free version of the app, as well as sample presentation slides and AI-generated questions for practice. We hope you enjoy the new features!

reviews.review_description:
Very interesting how much content and real tech is in the app.  There is speech analysis, cadence training, and more.

Full warning, a lot of features rely on the website and there are more advanced courses to purchase.  The tutorial is also worth watching - I didn't get a sense of how many in depth features there were till I watched.

Even in the base app, it's incredible the feeling you get standing in front of the stage.  Short of putting 90 people in a room to practice, this seems the closest you can get!

I am only using the free version. It’s improving my speech and articulation. If you are a entrepeneur or needing a speech coach, then this app is doing a great thing. For me this is just a FREE way to practice my speech. No intention whatsoever to caugh up 45 dollar a month. OPEN AI on my iPhone is doing the same thing, but NO avatar. So talking to a gesticulating avatar is a great experience. I bet that APPLE on the Apple Vision Pro is making something like this APP but in APPLE style and not MARKY ZUCKY his inferior Meta Store style 🤮. It will be when the VISION APP store opens in the Apple Vision Pro. I use the MetaQuest because I am waiting for the Apple Vision Pro Available in 🇧🇪 in early 2025

I love the AI feedback. It’s surprisingly insightful. I never thought I would feel so stressed talking to an avatar. I have used it to practice handling one-to-ones at work and it’s been incredibly useful. The speaking practice rooms are amazing too - especially if you choose to have distractions and questions switched on. Great for anyone who wants to practice and get feedback on their speaking skills.

A concept like this needs to be designed and executed well, and it really is. The AI conversations feel very immersive and I felt my skills improve over just a few practice scenarios. Hearing feedback on my conversations has made me a lot more aware of my weak points and more confident in how I present myself. Would highly recommend to both beginners and advanced speakers.
This is amazing. I recommend this for any and everyone of all ages.
Used this app to prepare for a few work presentations.
Bad so hard to figure out how to do it

developer_response.body: Hi, what were you struggling to figure out? We'll work on improving the process for future users.

reviews.review_description: This really helped with my public speaking! There are 4 VR environments that can be used to practice presentations in and getting used to the fear factor of 'all eyes on you'. For more than that, you enrol on one of the courses (e-learning & VR) and you enter a code in the app to unlock many other environments, training and features, and take your practice and learning to the next level.

reviews.review_title: Am not able to download app. Please help
reviews.review_description: Am not able to download

developer_response.body: Hi, please contact info@virtualspeech.com and we'll get this fixed for you.

reviews.review_description: The content was boring once you could get to it. Didn’t like it at all. Wouldn’t recommend.
So impressed by how interactive this app is , has greatly improved my confidence in public speaking.
